description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI - Windows that runs on push to master and tags matching v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+, and on pull requests. Use a single windows-2022 job that checks out the repository with submodules, installs Qt 6.8.3, python zstandard, and configures CMake. Then build, test, and package PokeFinder, and upload the artifact and release if a tag is pushed.
